occupied by lVloon, must be considered as a watery

9th house and its lord from t}:re lagna proper too is

of the native.
Caste (I)
There are four castes uiz. Brahrnin (holy one), Ksha-
triya (warrior), Vaishya (Trader) and Shudra (Labour). All
the planets belong to these castes as Jupiter and Venus:
Brahmin; Sun and Mars: Kshatriya; Moon and Mercury;
Vaishya; and Saturn Shudra:
